message:
feat: extension system overhaul, tool security hardening, HTTP connector refactor, provider additions, and Node.js shim expansion

Extension system (extensions.rs, extensions_js.rs, extension_events.rs,
extension_dispatcher.rs, extension_preflight.rs, agent.rs, resources.rs):
  Add nine new ExtensionEventName variants: context (fires before each
  provider call, allows message injection), session_start,
  resources_discover, model_select, user_bash, session_before_tree,
  session_tree, session_shutdown (dispatched on ExtensionRegion drop).
  Implement extension-driven MCP server registration via
  register_mcp_server() and __pi_register_mcp_server_for_extension JS
  global. Add UI methods getEditorText, getAllThemes, getTheme, setTheme.
  Rename is_hostcall_pending to is_hostcall_active with separate cancelled
  set. Structured before_agent_start and session_before_compact responses
  with system-prompt override and extension-provided CompactionEntry.
  Extension-driven resource discovery at startup and /reload with
  ExtensionResourcePaths and ResourceLoader::extend_with_paths().

Tool security (tools.rs):
  Enforce CWD boundary on all filesystem tools via shared
  enforce_cwd_scope() helper with normalize_dot_segments(). Raise
  DEFAULT_MAX_BYTES from 50KB to 1MB matching TypeScript reference.
  Fix occurrence counting in process_rg_json_match_line. Fix edit tool
  fuzzy matching for trailing Unicode whitespace and CR-only files with
  count_overlapping_occurrences and exact_match flag.

HTTP connector + OpenAI Responses (connectors/http.rs, providers/):
  Rewrite HttpConnector to delegate to asupersync h1 client (~900 lines
  removed). Add full NDJSON streaming support via NdjsonStream and
  ResponsesEventStream dispatch. Missing Content-Type is now fail-closed
  for non-codex endpoints. Add reasoning delta tests.

Providers + auth (provider_metadata.rs, models.rs, auth.rs):
  Add alibaba-us (DashScope US) as distinct Qwen variant. Trim whitespace
  from provider IDs. Implement AWS profile-based credential resolution
  from ~/.aws/credentials and ~/.aws/config with INI parser.

Node.js shims (crypto_shim.rs, extensions_js.rs):
  Native Rust-backed pbkdf2Sync/pbkdf2 and scryptSync/scrypt hostcalls.
  Upgrade readline shim to pi.ui('input')-backed. Add readline/promises,
  node:test minimal runner, assert/strict, http2 stub, timers canonical.
  Harden crypto: normalizeDigestName, createHash/createHmac empty check,
  randomBytes/randomInt safe integer validation.

Interactive UI (interactive/):
  Theme API for extensions (getAllThemes, getTheme, setTheme). /template
  command for prompt template expansion. AutocompleteRefresh with 30s
  cache TTL. "none" doubleEscapeAction. Source param for model switching.

Config + CLI (config.rs, cli.rs, main.rs):
  Add fail_closed_hooks option (PI_EXTENSION_HOOKS_FAIL_CLOSED env).
  Correct compaction/retry defaults to match TS reference. Narrow default
  tools to read,write,edit,bash. Fix extension flag extraction after
  message args. Add list-models provider note.

RPC (rpc.rs):
  Accept reserveTokens/keepRecentTokens per-request overrides on compact
  command. Mark RPC sessions with InputSource::Rpc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -815,6 +815,7 @@ fn parse_event_name(name: &str) -> Result<ExtensionEventName> {
         "startup" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::Startup),
         "input" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::Input),
         "before_agent_start" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::BeforeAgentStart),
+        "context" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::Context),
         "agent_start" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::AgentStart),
         "agent_end" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::AgentEnd),
         "turn_start" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::TurnStart),
@@ -827,12 +828,19 @@ fn parse_event_name(name: &str) -> Result<ExtensionEventName> {
         "tool_execution_end" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::ToolExecutionEnd),
         "tool_call" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::ToolCall),
         "tool_result" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::ToolResult),
+        "session_start" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::SessionStart),
         "session_before_switch" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::SessionBeforeSwitch),
         "session_switch" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::SessionSwitch),
         "session_before_fork" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::SessionBeforeFork),
         "session_fork" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::SessionFork),
         "session_before_compact" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::SessionBeforeCompact),
         "session_compact" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::SessionCompact),
+        "resources_discover" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::ResourcesDiscover),
+        "model_select" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::ModelSelect),
+        "user_bash" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::UserBash),
+        "session_before_tree" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::SessionBeforeTree),
+        "session_tree" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::SessionTree),
+        "session_shutdown" => Ok(ExtensionEventName::SessionShutdown),
         other => bail!("Unsupported event name: {other}"),
     }
 }
